title: Integer
documentation:
## Purpose
The [Integer](https://capdag.com/browse/media:integer;numeric;textable) type represents a single signed integer value encoded as UTF-8 text — a subtype of the general numeric type.

## When to use
Use this type when a node outputs or accepts a single whole-number value — for example, a count, an index, an HTTP status code, or any context where fractional values are meaningless. For sequences of integers, use `media:integer;list;numeric;textable`.

## Notes
The value must be a decimal integer literal, optionally prefixed with `-` for negative values. No fractional part, exponent notation, or leading zeros (beyond a single `0`) are permitted. Implementers should parse with 64-bit signed integer semantics by default.
